content:
# Mogi Coulomb

**Summary**: A failure criterion used to determine shear failure of rock under stress.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014]] used Mogi-Coulomb to predict shear failure in the wellbore.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014]] Used to determine the shear failure limit in wellbore stability analysis.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014]] Comparison against caliper log data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Mogi-Coulomb criterion provided a better match for actual caliper data than Mohr-Coulomb. ([[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014, p. 65]])
